title: Agent Seams (harness/<agent>/seams.json)
description: Single source of truth for the STRUCTURE of the ranked-seams artifact produced by the find-agent-seams skill. The machine block embedded in SEAMS.md is a BARE ARRAY of seam objects (the human-readable blind_spots section lives in the surrounding markdown prose, not in this array). This file describes mechanical structure only (types, enums, channel grammar, additionalProperties). Semantic cross-field invariants (exactly one recommended seam, narrowness within 1..5, the recommended seam must declare at least one channel) live in ../scripts/validate_artifacts.py.

technique.description: The interception technique implied by the waist family.

seam_channel.description: An injectable channel at this seam: a canonical channel (or the seam-level card_field pseudo-channel), optionally parameterized with ':<param>' (e.g. tool_result:*, tool_result:amocrm, card_field:lead_snapshot).

file.description: Location of the waist as file:line or file:symbol.

narrowness.description: Narrowness rank (lower = narrower = preferred). Range 1..5 is enforced as a semantic invariant.

channels.description: Untrusted channels this seam can inject (may be empty for a non-injection seam).

recommended.description: Exactly one seam in the array must be recommended (enforced as a semantic invariant).

evidence.description: Optional rationale for the ranking / why the waist is side-effect-safe.

neutralize.description: Optional note on what side effects the adapter must neutralize at this seam.
